name: Spaghetti Sauce Puttanesca
recipeIngredient: 4 cans Peeled Italian plum tomatoes (28 oz.)
1/2 cup Kalamata olives; pitted and halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the sauce by making a paste of olive oil and chopped anchovies.
2. Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven, then add the anchovies and stir until combined.
3. Add the tomatoes with their juices, breaking up the tomatoes to incorporate them into the mixture.
4. Cook for 2 hours, stirring occasionally.
5. Stir in the fresh basil and oregano, then cook for an additional 6 to 8 hours, adding water if needed to maintain a liquid consistency.
6. Add half of the garlic cloves along with the olives and capers during the last hour of cooking.
7. Cook until the flavors are well blended (about 30 minutes total).
8. Serve over pasta and garnish with grated Parmesan cheese.
